"opinion": "As a 60-year-old man, bisexual journalist living in Philadelphia, I have found that the best way to manage and deal with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines is to approach them with empathy and a critical perspective. By being well-informed and thoughtfully engaging in discussions, I have found that it is possible to navigate these topics in a way that is both respectful and productive.
